description_long: This bird features a vibrant and striking plumage with a blue head, green back, and red underparts, making it highly noticeable in any urban park or garden. Its wings display a blend of green and yellow, while the tail is elongated and subtly transitions from green to brownish hues. The beak is short, conical, and gray, well-suited for seed eating. The legs are slender and gray, supporting the bird in a typical perching posture. The eyes are dark and prominent, set against the vivid blue of the head. The overall body is compact and streamlined, ideal for agile movement among trees and shrubs.
description: A small, vividly colored bird with a blue head, green back, and red underparts, featuring a conical beak and slender gray legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue head, green back, red underparts, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the blue head, symmetrical red chest, and both gray legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar coloration, emphasizing the beak and the transition of colors along the body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the green back, the full tail, and the gradient of colors from back to tail tip.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid blue head, green back, red underparts, with subtle gradients and clear color demarcations across the body and wings.
